title: Cops get another hug from Hirunika
body_lines: The 5th Lane in Colombo where PM Ranil Wickramasinghe's private residence is situated was blocked by a group of protestors led by SJB member Hirunika Premachandra this morning. The protestors attempted to storm the police barricades which resulted in traffic chaos in the area.  Images show Hirunika hugging a police officer, an act many people believe is her modus operandi at protests. Pix by Pradeep Dilrukshana
